# Customer Support FAQ

## Password Reset

**Q: How do I reset my password?**
A: Go to the login page and click "Forgot password". Enter your registered email address and we will send a reset link within 5 minutes. The link expires after 24 hours. If you do not receive it, check your spam folder or try resending from the login page.

## Refund Policy

**Q: What is your refund policy and how long does it take?**
A: We offer a full refund within 30 days of purchase for items in original condition. Digital downloads can be refunded within 7 days if not yet downloaded. Submit a refund request from your account under Order History. Processing takes 3–5 business days back to your original payment method.

## Billing Information

**Q: How do I update my billing information?**
A: Log into your account and navigate to Settings > Billing. You can update your credit card number, expiry date, billing address, and preferred payment method. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and PayPal.

## Account Locked

**Q: My account is locked. What should I do?**
A: Accounts are automatically locked after 5 failed login attempts as a security precaution. Wait 15 minutes for the lock to expire automatically, then try again with the correct password. Alternatively, click "Forgot password" on the login page to reset your credentials immediately.
